name: Basic Attack
desc: Deals damage to an enemy. Damage = max(0, ATK - DEF).

name: Defend
desc: Increases defence by 10 for current and next round.

name: Healing Potion
desc: Heals for 100 HP. New HP = min(currHP + 100, maxHP).

name: Power Stone
desc: Triggers the player's special skill once without affecting its cooldown.

name: Smoke Bomb
desc: Enemy attacks deal 0 damage for the current and next round.

name: Shield Bash
desc: Warrior special: deal BasicAttack damage and stun target for 2 turns. Cooldown: 3 rounds.

name: Arcane Blast
desc: Wizard special: deal BasicAttack damage to ALL enemies. Each kill grants +10 ATK permanently. Cooldown: 3 rounds.
